assertions.expectation: Starts with pre-flight checks: current versions, cluster health, node status
assertions.reason: The response includes comprehensive pre-flight checks with commands to check current cluster version, node pool versions, node status, and application health

assertions.expectation: Includes the gcloud command to check available versions in the release channel
assertions.reason: Step 7 includes the exact command: 'gcloud container get-server-config --zone $ZONE --format="yaml(channels,validMasterVersions)"' to check available versions

assertions.expectation: Includes the API deprecation check command before upgrading
assertions.reason: The response does not include any command to check for API deprecations before upgrading, which is a critical pre-upgrade step

assertions.expectation: Provides the exact gcloud command for control plane upgrade to 1.31 first (--master flag)
assertions.reason: The response shows upgrading from 1.32 to 1.32 (same version), not to 1.31 first. The user prompt incorrectly states going from 1.32 to 1.32, but the expectation asks for 1.31 first

assertions.expectation: Includes a verification step after control plane upgrade with expected output
assertions.reason: Step 9 includes verification commands after control plane upgrade, checking master version and cluster health

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for node pool upgrades — may use skip-level (N+2) for node pools to reduce steps
assertions.reason: Steps 10 and 12 provide exact gcloud commands for upgrading both node pools, though skip-level upgrading is not explicitly mentioned

assertions.expectation: Includes monitoring commands to watch node pool upgrade progress
assertions.reason: Steps 10 and 12 include 'watch "kubectl get nodes -o wide"' commands to monitor upgrade progress

assertions.expectation: Provides sequential control plane upgrades (1.30→1.31→1.32) with option for skip-level node pool upgrades
assertions.reason: The response does not provide sequential upgrades through multiple versions. It only addresses upgrading within 1.32 patch versions, not the sequential path 1.30→1.31→1.32

assertions.expectation: Includes post-upgrade validation: node versions, pod health, kube-system pods
assertions.reason: Step 14 includes comprehensive post-upgrade validation checking node versions, pod status, services, and cluster health

assertions.expectation: Provides a rollback section explaining what to do if something goes wrong
assertions.reason: The troubleshooting section includes rollback commands and guidance, though it recommends contacting team lead first
